visibility_policy_posture: Public-safe summary and placeholder posture only.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Start intake, capture evidence, and submit safely into the governed request pipeline.
allowed_mutations: Create or update SubmissionEnvelope fields and submit for promotion.
continuity_expectations: Keep the same intake lineage across web, later sign-in, and later recovery.
degraded_recovery_states: Fallback review, artifact quarantine, or safe receipt in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Optional NHS login uplift; Binary artifact store
notes: Derived route label pending later endpoint hardening.

identity_posture: Phone-origin patient identification or partial identity capture.
visibility_policy_posture: Public-safe summary only until richer proof exists.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Start or continue the same governed intake lineage through phone or IVR.
allowed_mutations: Append telephony ingress records and trigger secure-link continuation when needed.
continuity_expectations: Preserve the same intake lineage across phone, SMS continuation, and later digital recovery.
degraded_recovery_states: Telephony outage or fallback review without creating a separate support-only queue.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Telephony adapter; Optional SMS follow-up

sub_persona: Grant-scoped patient resuming a specific lineage
identity_posture: Minimal grant or verified continuation before full authenticated uplift.
visibility_policy_posture: Summary-only or suppressed-recovery-only visibility until route checks pass.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Resume or recover a specific lineage action through a minimal secure-link grant.
allowed_mutations: Redeem secure link, claim or re-auth, and continue a route-bound action.
continuity_expectations: Keep the same request or child-route anchor through redemption and step-up.
degraded_recovery_states: Expired link, identity hold, placeholder-only, or safe-browser handoff posture.
external_dependency_touchpoints: SMS secure-link delivery; NHS login step-up
notes: This row closes the patient public vs grant-scoped confusion without inventing a second patient shell.

visibility_policy_posture: Authenticated summary and orientation only after current visibility and continuity checks pass.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Orient the patient, surface the dominant next safe action, and preserve a stable portal shell.
allowed_mutations: No direct mutation; launch the next safe child action from the current shell.
continuity_expectations: Preserve spotlight, nav return, and selected anchor through refresh and child work.
degraded_recovery_states: Read-only, placeholder, or bounded recovery posture in the same shell.
external_dependency_touchpoints: NHS login; Notification delivery rails
source_refs: patient-portal-experience-architecture-blueprint.md#Portal entry and shell topology; patient-account-and-communications-blueprint.md#Patient home contract

visibility_policy_posture: Request rows, detail, and child placeholders are visibility-governed and continuity-bound.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Browse requests, inspect lineage strips, and act on request-bound follow-up work.
allowed_mutations: Route-bound follow-up such as more-info reply, recovery, or child-work entry.
continuity_expectations: Stay in the same patient shell while moving between request list, detail, and child routes.
degraded_recovery_states: Placeholder-only, stale-row, or recovery-required posture without detached request pages.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Messaging, callback, booking, hub, and pharmacy child projections
source_refs: patient-account-and-communications-blueprint.md#Requests browsing contract; patient-account-and-communications-blueprint.md#Request detail contract

visibility_policy_posture: Booking manage posture is subordinate to authoritative reservation and settlement truth.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Inspect appointment truth, manage it honestly, and continue waitlist or hub-managed work without leaving the shell.
allowed_mutations: Manage appointment, accept waitlist or hub alternative, or continue booking-safe actions under route intent.
continuity_expectations: Keep the same request shell and selected option anchor across booking, waitlist, and manage child states.
degraded_recovery_states: Pending confirmation, waitlist fallback, read-only, or bounded recovery posture instead of false booked reassurance.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Booking provider adapters; External confirmation gate
source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#5.6 Booking, waitlist, hub, and pharmacy continuity algorithm; patient-account-and-communications-blueprint.md#Core projections

visibility_policy_posture: Artifact parity and visibility posture must stay aligned before detail or bytes render.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Read results, documents, and record updates without losing portal continuity.
allowed_mutations: No direct clinical mutation; only governed artifact and handoff actions where allowed.
continuity_expectations: Preserve return paths to active requests, messages, or appointments while staying in the same patient shell.
degraded_recovery_states: Table-only, summary-only, placeholder-only, or artifact recovery posture in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Artifact delivery rails; Outbound navigation grants
source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#5.5A Patient record and results visualization algorithm; patient-account-and-communications-blueprint.md#Core projections

visibility_policy_posture: Preview, reply, and callback posture stay subordinate to visibility policy, reachability truth, and settlement evidence.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Read and reply to messages, callback prompts, and patient-visible communication work inside the same shell.
allowed_mutations: Reply, acknowledge, or act on callback and communication work under route intent and settlement truth.
continuity_expectations: Keep the same patient shell, thread anchor, and current required action while the conversation settles.
degraded_recovery_states: Delivery dispute, read-only, placeholder, or recovery-required thread posture without detached mini-flows.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Messaging providers; Telephony provider
source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#5.5 Unified care conversation algorithm; callback-and-clinician-messaging-loop.md

ingress_channel: Embedded webview / NHS App-style embedded channel
identity_posture: Authenticated patient in a trusted embedded host context.
visibility_policy_posture: Embedded posture narrows capability without changing shell ownership.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Use the same patient portal sections under embedded host constraints and release controls.
allowed_mutations: The same route-bound patient actions as browser mode, but only when embedded validation remains current.
continuity_expectations: Preserve shell identity while chrome, bridge capability, and artifact behavior narrow.
degraded_recovery_states: Safe-browser handoff, read-only, placeholder, or blocked posture inside the same shell.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Embedded host bridge; Release and channel freezes

sub_persona: Clinician or designated reviewer in Clinical Workspace
surface_name: Clinical Workspace queue and task canvas
visibility_policy_posture: Clinical review detail is bounded by origin-practice coverage and current review trust.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Scan the queue, open the right task, and move to a safe human decision quickly.
allowed_mutations: Claim, review, and route work under the current review lease and trust envelope.
continuity_expectations: Stay in the same workspace shell while queue, task, and selected anchor remain continuity-compatible.
degraded_recovery_states: Observe-only, reassigned, or recovery-required posture with the last safe task summary preserved.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Staff auth rail; Downstream booking, callback, and pharmacy services
source_refs: staff-workspace-interface-architecture.md#Route family; staff-operations-and-support-blueprint.md#Clinical Workspace specialization

sub_persona: Clinician or designated reviewer in Clinical Workspace
identity_posture: Child clinical review posture inside the active task shell.
visibility_policy_posture: No child route may replace the workspace shell or outrun lease and settlement truth.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Work more-info, decision, approval, escalation, and changed-since-seen child states without losing task continuity.
allowed_mutations: Compose, confirm, or escalate under protected composition and settlement gates.
continuity_expectations: Stay on the same task shell while child review surfaces open as same-shell child or bounded side stages.
degraded_recovery_states: Protected composition freeze, stale review demotion, or bounded recovery in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Messaging delivery rails; Approval chains
source_refs: staff-workspace-interface-architecture.md#Route family; staff-workspace-interface-architecture.md#Additional route rules

visibility_policy_posture: Operational staff inherits origin-practice coverage but not clinician-wide narrative or governance payloads.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Work operational and admin-resolution tasks in the same workspace shell as queue and task context changes.
allowed_mutations: Claim, review, send more-info, and complete bounded operational actions under the current lease.
continuity_expectations: Keep queue filters and selected task anchors stable across operational task switches.
degraded_recovery_states: Blocked, observe-only, or recovery-required posture in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Staff auth rail; Operational messaging and booking services
source_refs: staff-workspace-interface-architecture.md#Route family; staff-operations-and-support-blueprint.md#Staff audience coverage contract

visibility_policy_posture: Only coordination-safe summary and acknowledgement debt should appear at queue level.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Claim and prioritize cross-site coordination work from one hub queue.
allowed_mutations: Claim, release, or transfer hub cases under lease and acting-context rules.
continuity_expectations: Preserve queue context and selected case anchor inside the same hub shell.
degraded_recovery_states: Stale-owner recovery, policy-blocked, or degraded candidate posture in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Cross-site booking adapters; Policy packs

surface_name: Hub case, alternatives, exception, and audit work
control_plane_rules: RouteFamilyOwnershipClaim; Continuity evidence for hub booking manage
visibility_policy_posture: Hub case detail is the shell root even when child work references booking, callback, or audit evidence.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Coordinate alternatives, callback fallback, return-to-practice, and confirmation truth on one active hub case.
allowed_mutations: Offer alternatives, commit native booking, initiate callback fallback, or return to practice.
continuity_expectations: Preserve the same hub case shell and selected case anchor through alternatives, audit, and fallback child work.
degraded_recovery_states: Confirmation pending, booked_pending_practice_ack, callback transfer pending, disputed truth, or identity-repair hold without leaving the active case.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Cross-site booking adapters; Practice acknowledgement delivery; Callback linkage

identity_posture: Servicing-site delivery posture inside the pharmacy shell.
visibility_policy_posture: The pharmacy console owns the mission frame even when the path begins under /workspace.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Validate, fulfil, hand off, and assure pharmacy work in a dedicated pharmacy mission frame.
allowed_mutations: Validate, inventory-check, resolve, hand off, and assurance-review within the active case.
continuity_expectations: Preserve the active pharmacy case anchor across case, compare, inventory, handoff, and assurance routes.
degraded_recovery_states: Read-only, reconcile-required, or blocked settlement posture in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Pharmacy dispatch transport; Outcome ingestion

identity_posture: Masked support posture with explicit disclosure ceiling and action lease.
visibility_policy_posture: Support cannot widen into unrestricted production access or an ad hoc replay system.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Operate a ticket-centric repair workspace with chronology, subject 360, handoff, and bounded recovery actions.
allowed_mutations: Controlled resend, reissue, attachment recovery, identity correction, and handoff work under the current support action lease.
continuity_expectations: Stay in one support shell while moving between ticket, conversation, history, knowledge, and action child routes.
degraded_recovery_states: Read-only fallback, pending-external hold, or recovery-required posture without context-destroying page swaps.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Notification delivery rails; Secure-link issuance; Telephony delivery
source_refs: staff-operations-and-support-blueprint.md#Support route contract

control_plane_rules: Mask scope validation; Replay release decision; SupportContinuityEvidenceProjection
identity_posture: Support replay posture under a frozen checkpoint.
visibility_policy_posture: Replay does not become a detached forensic product and may not re-arm live mutation controls until same-shell restore settles.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Inspect replay or observe-only evidence without losing the current ticket shell or mask scope.
allowed_mutations: Observe-only review and replay release decisions; no live repair mutation until restore revalidates.
continuity_expectations: Replay and observe are bounded child routes of the same support shell and same ticket anchor.
degraded_recovery_states: Read-only fallback, stale reacquire, or awaiting-external hold while preserving the ticket anchor.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Support replay tooling; Audit evidence
source_refs: staff-operations-and-support-blueprint.md#Support route contract; phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#6.5 Support and replay algorithm

identity_posture: Support posture with masked subject scope while assisting intake or recovery.
visibility_policy_posture: This closes the scattered-support gap by giving assisted capture its own explicit surface entry.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Assist intake or recovery capture into the same governed patient lineage from inside the support workspace.
allowed_mutations: Append support-assisted ingress, reissue minimal access, or repair contact-route state under the active support ticket and disclosure ceiling.
continuity_expectations: The patient lineage stays intact; support capture does not mint a second workflow system.
degraded_recovery_states: Read-only fallback or explicit reacquire path if the current support ticket, scope, or route intent is stale.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Secure-link issuance; Notification delivery rails
notes: Inventory row added to make support-assisted capture explicit rather than implied.
source_refs: blueprint-init.md#2. Core product surfaces; staff-operations-and-support-blueprint.md#Support route contract

visibility_policy_posture: Board context must stay denser than ordinary staff shells but still obey one dominant anomaly and one dominant intervention surface.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Scan service health, choose the dominant anomaly, and preserve board context while deciding where to intervene.
allowed_mutations: No governance mutation here; only bounded operational actions within the current action fence.
continuity_expectations: Keep the same shell while filters, horizon, selected anomaly, and board tuple remain valid.
degraded_recovery_states: Read-only diagnostic, partial restore, stale selection freeze, or fallback lens restore without losing the last stable board.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Telemetry and queue health feeds; Assurance evidence; Release watch tuples
source_refs: operations-console-frontend-blueprint.md#Canonical route family; operations-console-frontend-blueprint.md#Calm board posture and briefing artifacts

identity_posture: Operations drill-down posture on the current board scope.
visibility_policy_posture: Investigation, intervention, compare, and health drill-down remain same-shell children until a real governance handoff occurs.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Inspect or issue bounded interventions, compare scenarios, and preserve board return context.
allowed_mutations: Issue interventions only while the current fence is live, or hand off to governance with an exact return token.
continuity_expectations: Return to the same board snapshot and selected anomaly after drill-down or governance handoff.
degraded_recovery_states: Blocked guardrail, read-only diagnostic, or fallback restore while keeping the last stable board visible.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Governance handoff; Audit and assurance pivots
source_refs: operations-console-frontend-blueprint.md#Canonical route family; operations-console-frontend-blueprint.md#Restore reporting and board-frame discipline

sub_persona: Governance, admin, config, comms, or access lead
visibility_policy_posture: This is a distinct control surface, not an operations subpanel or raw CRUD console.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Review, approve, promote, rollback, and govern access or configuration work inside one governance shell.
allowed_mutations: Approve, promote, rollback, govern access, update config, and manage communications under the current review package.
continuity_expectations: Keep one governance continuity frame across diff, impact, simulation, approval, promotion watch, and evidence pivots.
degraded_recovery_states: Freeze disposition, blocked guardrail, or read-only evidence pivot with the same governed object and scope token preserved.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Release watch tuples; Approval evidence; Config and comms publications
source_refs: governance-admin-console-frontend-blueprint.md#Shell and route topology; governance-admin-console-frontend-blueprint.md#Primary governance personas

surface_name: Assistive companion sidecar inside the owning task
identity_posture: Adjunct operator mode bound to the current owning shell.
visibility_policy_posture: Assistive output inherits the owning shell visibility ceiling and trust envelope.
primary_jobs_to_be_done: Inspect or use assistive suggestions without displacing the primary review or support task.
allowed_mutations: Visible summary, bounded insert, observe-only review, or feedback capture under the current assistive grant.
continuity_expectations: Remain inside the owning shell and selected anchor unless the corpus explicitly calls for standalone evaluation or replay tooling.
degraded_recovery_states: Shadow-only, quarantined, regenerate-required, or blocked posture while keeping the human-led task in place.
external_dependency_touchpoints: Model registry; Runtime publication bundle; Feedback capture
notes: This row keeps assistive use explicit while preserving the bounded-sidecar rule.
